history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The goal is visible to the upper-right, but I need to reorient first. Turning right will face me toward a safe open cell, allowing progress around the hazard.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The safe open cell to my left is the best immediate option to navigate toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward at row 07 column D. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safest immediate move is to turn right, which will let me head toward the open cells on the bottom row and work around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is `.` and safe, while the goal `G` is visible nearby but not directly accessible from the current orientation. The safest immediate progress is to move forward into the open cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07, column D facing upward. The cell directly ahead is row 06, column D, which is a safe floor cell. The goal is visible to the left, but moving forward is the safest immediate step and keeps me inside the open corridor instead of turning into an unknown direction.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible on the same row, one cell to my left. Since I am facing upward (as indicated by ^), moving forward would not help. I need to turn left to face the goal, then I can move toward it on the next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing up. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is a safe floor. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 05 column D without entering lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is on row 06 column D, which is the goal. It is safe and immediately reachable, so the best move is to go forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
